payload.name: post
payload.description: post a message to the wall

payload.name: wall
payload.description: a live message board over wall.posted events, with a post form
payload.implementation:
#!/usr/bin/env python3 # wall — render every wall.posted as a message board. Bare semantic HTML + the # kernel class vocabulary (msg/who/muted); a /run/post form for new messages. import sys, json from html import escape msgs = [] for line in sys.stdin: line = line.strip() if not line: continue e = json.loads(line) if e.get("name") == "wall.posted": p = e.get("payload", {}) when = (e.get("occurred_at", "") or "")[:19].replace("T", " ") msgs.append((p.get("author", "anon"), p.get("text", ""), when)) print("the wall") print("

the wall

") print("

%d message(s), replayed from the log.

" % len(msgs)) for author, text, when in msgs: print("
%s · %s
%s
" % (escape(author), escape(when), escape(text))) print("
") print("")
